whoWeAre.label: Who We Are
whoWeAre.heading: Boutique Property Management Agency
whoWeAre.para1: Solar Living is a boutique holiday apartment management agency based in Umag, Istria, Croatia. We manage a curated portfolio of premium apartments for guests seeking exceptional accommodation on the Adriatic coast.
whoWeAre.elaineDetails: , a spacious, first row to the sea located apartment with panoramic view of the Adriatic Sea, sunset, and Umag Old Town.
whoWeAre.stellaDetails: , a ground-floor apartment in Umag's finest new building, featuring a private Mediterranean garden with an olive tree.
whoWeAre.para3: Both apartments are consistently rated 9.8 or above on Booking.com and 5.0/5 on Airbnb, reflecting our commitment to cleanliness, comfort, and exceptional guest service.
whoWeAre.para4: For property owners, Solar Living offers a full management service covering professional photography, listing management across all major platforms, 24/7 guest communication, cleaning coordination, dynamic pricing, and monthly reporting.
whoWeAre.para5: Solar Living is part of the Solar Group, alongside Solar Creative, a marketing agency based in Dubai.

ownersCta.label: Property Owners
ownersCta.heading: Own a Property in Istria?
ownersCta.body: Join our portfolio and enjoy full management, guaranteed care, and outstanding results. We handle everything.

location.label: Where We Are
location.heading: Umag, Istria
location.body: Nestled on the northwestern tip of Istria, Umag is a charming medieval town with crystal-clear Adriatic waters, world-class gastronomy, and a laid-back Mediterranean atmosphere. The perfect destination for a truly restorative holiday.

email.subject: Booking Inquiry – {name}

apt1.name: Elaine's View
apt1.description: First row to the sea. Panoramic views of the Adriatic, sunsets & Umag Old Town.

reviews.name: Tania
reviews.text: The apartment was clean and comfortable with balcony views of evening sunsets over the Adriatic and the old town of Umag. Umag is a perfect spot to enjoy Istria — including day trips into Italy. Weather was perfect, interesting history and gorgeous scenery.

reviews.name: Stephan
reviews.text: We were received very kindly and personally. A big, well laid out apartment overlooking the sea. There is a balcony to the sea side, but also to the side — very practical. We found it very quiet.

reviews.name: Jana
reviews.text: Perfect accommodation. A premium apartment with a stunning sea view. Right in front of the building is a city beach with easy sea access and very few people. Very friendly and professional communication with the host. We will definitely return.

apt2.name: Stella's Garden
apt2.description: Ground-floor living in Umag's finest new building, with a private Mediterranean garden.

reviews.name: Peter
reviews.text: Everything was sparkling clean and very modern — you almost felt like we were the first guests. Extremely friendly host, always immediately available for questions with very quick answers.

reviews.name: Jehona
reviews.text: Everything is excellent — better than a 5-star hotel. I recommend it to everyone. I have never seen something like this. The owner was very kind and showed us everything.

reviews.name: Maciej
reviews.text: Highly recommended. Spacious ground-floor apartment with comfortable beds, a well-equipped kitchen, air conditioning, and two bathrooms. Large terrace with assigned parking. 2 minutes by car to shopping centers, 4-5 minutes to the nearest beach.

apt3.name: Solar Apartment Umag III
apt3.description: A stunning new addition to our portfolio — details coming soon. Contact us to be the first to know when this property becomes available.

apt4.name: Solar Apartment Umag IV
apt4.description: An exceptional property currently being prepared for our portfolio. Reach out to learn more.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.heading: More Than Property Management.
hero.subtextLine1: We started Solar Living because we believed Istria deserved better.
hero.subtextLine2: A boutique approach to hospitality that puts guests and owners first.

story.label: Who We Are
story.para1: Solar Living is a boutique property management company based in Umag, on the beautiful northwestern coast of Istria, Croatia. We manage a carefully selected portfolio of premium apartments and villas, properties we personally vet, prepare, and maintain to the highest standard.
story.para2: We are part of the Solar Group, alongside Solar Creative, our marketing agency. This means every property in our portfolio benefits not just from management expertise, but from professional photography, branding, and digital marketing that most property managers simply don't offer.
story.para3: Our mission is simple: exceptional experiences for guests, absolute peace of mind for owners, and properties that consistently earn top-rated reviews.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Every property in our portfolio is handpicked. We say no to properties that don't meet our standards, because our guests deserve the best, every time.

hospitality.title: Genuine Hospitality
hospitality.descLine1: We don't just hand over keys. We make
hospitality.descLine2: sure every guest has everything they need
hospitality.descLine3: before they even ask. The little details
hospitality.descLine4: are what make a stay unforgettable.

partnership.title: Owner Partnership
partnership.descLine1: We treat every property as if it
partnership.descLine2: were our own. Owners trust us

solarGroup.label: Part of Something Bigger
solarGroup.heading: The Solar Group
solarGroup.para: Solar Living is proud to be part of the Solar Group, a family of companies united by a commitment to quality, creativity, and service. Our sister company, Solar Creative, is a full-service marketing agency that supports our properties with professional photography, social media, and brand strategy.
solarGroup.stat1Desc: Solar Living was founded with a vision to bring boutique-level service to Istrian property management.
solarGroup.stat2Desc: Based on the northwestern tip of Istria, steps from the Adriatic Sea.

cta.heading: Looking to book an apartment?
cta.body: Browse our available properties and send us a booking inquiry directly.

guests.label: For Guests
guests.q1: Where are the Solar Living apartments located?
guests.a1: Both apartments are located in Umag, a charming coastal town on the northwestern tip of Istria, Croatia. Elaine's View is in Umag Old Town, first row to the sea. Stella's Garden is in a brand new building in a quiet residential area of Umag, 4–5 minutes from the beach.
guests.q2: What is included in the apartments?
guests.a2: All apartments are fully equipped with air conditioning, Wi-Fi, a fully equipped kitchen, Smart TV, and fresh linen. Elaine's View also includes a washing machine and sea view terrace. Stella's Garden features a private Mediterranean garden and terrace.
guests.q3: How do I book an apartment?
guests.a3: You can send a booking inquiry directly through our website. Click "Check Availability & Book" on any apartment, fill in your details, and send via WhatsApp or email. We confirm availability and handle everything from there — no third-party platform needed.
guests.a4: Yes. Both Elaine's View and Stella's Garden include dedicated parking.
guests.q5: What are the guest ratings for Solar Living apartments?
guests.a5: Elaine's View holds a 9.9/10 rating on Booking.com and 5.0/5 on Airbnb. Stella's Garden holds a 9.8/10 on Booking.com and 5.0/5 on Airbnb.
guests.q6: How far are the apartments from the beach?
guests.a6: Elaine's View is first row to the sea — there is a city beach directly in front of the building. Stella's Garden is approximately 4–5 minutes by car from the nearest beach.
guests.q7: Can I take day trips from Umag?
guests.a7: Absolutely. Umag is ideally located for day trips to Venice (approx. 2 hours), Pula, Rovinj, and the Brijuni Islands. Italy's Aquileia and Trieste are also within easy reach.

owners.label: For Property Owners
owners.q1: What does Solar Living's property management service include?
owners.a1: We offer full-service property management including professional photography, multi-platform listing management (Airbnb, Booking.com, direct), 24/7 guest communication, cleaning and maintenance coordination, dynamic pricing optimization, and monthly performance reporting.
owners.q2: Which areas does Solar Living operate in?
owners.a2: We currently operate in Umag, Istria, Croatia, and are expanding across the Istrian peninsula.
owners.q3: How do I get started with Solar Living as a property owner?
owners.a3: Contact us via WhatsApp or email for a free consultation. We'll visit your property, provide recommendations, and agree on terms — with no commitment required.
owners.q4: Is Solar Living a licensed property management company?
owners.a4: Yes. Solar Living operates under BE CAPITAL, obrt za poslovanje nekretninama, vl. Evan Beaković, OIB: 30760238873, registered in Croatia.
